tasks.label: build: cab_api.lib
args: C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/api/cab_api.c -o cab_api.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -DCAB_API -c src/game/cab_game.c -o cab_game_api.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/game/cab_session.c -o cab_session.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/guess.c -o guess.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/game/cab_io.c -o cab_io.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/files/cab_files.c -o cab_files.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/word_set.c -o word_set.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/word_set_filter.c -o word_set_filter.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/index_array.c -o index_array.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/tools/cab_data_analysis.c -o cab_data_analysis.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/word.c -o word.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/util/utils.c -o utils.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/core/attempts.c -o attempts.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -c src/files/letter_dispositions.c -o letter_dispositions.o && C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe rcs cab_api.lib cab_api.o cab_game_api.o cab_session.o guess.o cab_io.o cab_files.o word_set.o word_set_filter.o index_array.o cab_data_analysis.o word.o utils.o attempts.o letter_dispositions.o

tasks.label: build: api_example
args: C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc -Dmain=cab_game_main -c src/game/cab_game.c -o cab_game_api.o && C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c11 -Isrc src/api/api_usage_example.c src/api/cab_api.c src/game/cab_session.c src/core/guess.c src/game/cab_io.c src/files/cab_files.c src/core/word_set.c src/core/word_set_filter.c src/core/index_array.c src/tools/cab_data_analysis.c src/core/word.c src/util/utils.c src/core/attempts.c src/files/letter_dispositions.c cab_game_api.o -o api_usage_example.exe

tasks.label: clean
args: del /q *.o cab_game.exe word.exe extract_5_letters_words.exe api_usage_example.exe cab_api.lib 2>nul
